Title: Login with valid credentials
Steps: 1. Go to profile.php 2. Enter any non-empty username/password 3. Click Login

Title: Login with empty credentials
Expected Result: Login error is shown; no session created

Title: Book appointment with valid data
Steps: 1. Select facility 2. Check hospital readmission 3. Select healthcare program 4. Enter visit date + comment 5. Book Appointment
Expected Result: Confirmation screen shows the exact facility and date submitted

Title: Confirmation data matches submission (data integrity)
Steps: Compare confirmation screen facility/date against what was submitted in TC-03
Expected Result: Facility and date on confirmation match submission exactly

Title: Past date accepted for new appointment
Steps: 1. Enter a past date in visit date field 2. Book Appointment
Expected Result: Should be rejected with validation error (exploratory - CURA does not enforce this, documented as a finding)
